content:
# Session 30 (iter-030) — review

## Metadata
- 2 prover lanes (opus): SNAP `Picard/SectionGradedRing.lean` (mathlib-build), FBC
  `Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean` (Route B prove).
- Sorry count (firsthand grep + cold build EXIT=0, 8319 jobs):
  - SNAP `SectionGradedRing.lean`: **6 → 6** (2397 off-path DO-NOT-TOUCH; 3296/3318/3333/3336/3420 the
    `tensorPowAdd_*` / `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` object-pentagon coherences). New decls add ZERO sorries.
  - FBC `FlatBaseChange.lean`: **9 → 9** (the `_concrete` bare sorry became a ~45-line verified
    reduction ending in 1 isolated `ModuleCat` identity sorry — net zero).
- **Net frontier elimination: 0. New sorry-free decls: 5** (all SNAP, all axiom-clean).
- Cold build of both modules GREEN, verified firsthand. blueprint-doctor CLEAN.

## SNAP — lax-monoidal KEYSTONE + GATE landed axiom-clean (CHURNING broken)
The iter-029 pivot's first real Lean. 5 decls added (all axiom `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`,
`toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal` + `sectionsMul_eq_laxTensorator` verified firsthand via `lean_verify`):
- `localizedSheafification` (L1473), `toPresheafLocalized` (L1490),
  `localizedSheafificationAdjunction` (L1498) — strong-monoidal localized sheafification + adjunction,
  by retyping existing decls out of the `LocalizedMonoidal` synonym (defeq).
- **`toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal` (L1512) — KEYSTONE.** `= (localizedSheafificationAdjunction
  X).rightAdjointLaxMonoidal`. The pentagon/triangle/hexagon for `ι = toPresheafOfModules` are now the
  *library* lax-monoidal coherence laws — no object-level coherence on `X.Modules` verified by hand.
- **`sectionsMul_eq_laxTensorator` (L1718) — STEP-0 GATE.** Outcome: the tensorator is **NOT** defeq
  `sectionsMul`; `μ_Γ|_⊤ = sectionsMul(F,G) ≫ Γ((tensorObjLocalizedIso F G).hom)`. Light + fully proved
  (presheaf single comp-instance), precisely the bridge strategy-critic iter-029 flagged.

### DECISIVE structural finding (corrects PROGRESS/memory)
`rightAdjointLaxMonoidal` **requires** `MonoidalCategory X.Modules` — so `LocalizedMonoidal` is a
**prerequisite, not a fallback**. That prerequisite (`W_isMonoidal`, `modulesLocalizedMonoidal`,
`tensorObjLocalizedIso`, `localizedMonoidalUnitIso`, `oplaxMonoidal_δ_eq`) was **already built in-file** —
contradicting PROGRESS/memory which still listed `W.IsMonoidal` as a wall. The keystone sat cleanly on it.

### STEP 2 (`sectionsMul_mul_assoc` re-wire) NOT done — gated, as the iter-028 reversal signal predicted
Graded `·` = `Γ(tensorPowAdd.hom) ∘ sectionsMul`. The lax `associativity` law governs `μ`/`sectionsMul`,
but the grading reindex iso `tensorPowAdd` is built recursively from the hand-built `tensorObjAssoc`, so
`tensorPowAdd_assoc` (= `hM`, L3336) still needs `tensorObjAssoc`'s pentagon = the morphism bridge
`tensorObjAssoc_eq_localized` — the documented dual-instance whnf wall (`tensorObjAssoc_hK_lhs` sorry
L2397, DO-NOT-TOUCH). The lax law does NOT bypass it (separate pentagon, one layer down).
**Recommended next route (prover, grounded in the now-landed keystone+gate):** faithfulness of
`toPresheafOfModules` (it is `Faithful`) → reduce `hM` to a *presheaf*-morphism identity in ONE
comp-instance, then assemble from `LaxMonoidal.associativity (toPresheafLocalized X)` + the proven bridges
(`tensorObjUnitIso_eq_localizedLeftUnitor`, `tensorBraiding_eq_localizedBraiding`,
`sectionsMul_eq_laxTensorator`) + `μ_natural_left/right`.

## FBC — Route B reduced the crux to one clean module identity (sorry flat)
`pullback_spec_tilde_iso_ring_square_natural_concrete` (~L2452): bare sorry → ~45-line verified,
axiom-free, cold-green categorical reduction via full faithfulness of `tilde`
(`tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor`), ending in ONE isolated `ModuleCat (R'⊗ₐB)`-linear identity
(geometric reindex = algebraic reassoc — the genuine Stacks-01I9 part-(1) cocycle). lean-auditor confirms
the reduction is real (full-faithfulness step substantive, not a shell). Verified reusable mechanics:
- `tilde.functor_obj` NECESSARY to unify `tilde X` vs `(tilde.functor _).obj X` so `rw [← Iso.inv_comp_eq]` fires.
- `map_preimage` assembly must be `refine`/`exact` (defeq-tolerant), NOT `rw`.
- iso-level cancel (`have h3` + `← goal2`) AVOIDS the `.hom`-level `cancel_mono pIR'.hom`, which whnf-times-out @300s.

Both closing routes for the residual confirmed DEAD: (1) element route via `ModuleCat.hom_ext` forces
`Γ`-of-`pullbackComp` coherences = the per-decl kernel-timeout wall; (2) mate route = the mate-cocycle
FOLD dead on all 3 sub-routes (out of scope per directive). So Route B reaches the SAME irreducible
cocycle content as Route A but isolates it as a single clean kernel-free identity — strictly better frontier.
Crux `_ring_square_natural` NOT retargeted (conditioned on Route B closing, which it has not).

## Progress-trajectory read
- **SNAP: CHURNING broken.** After 2-of-3 plan-only pivot iters, this landed 5 axiom-clean decls
  realizing the keystone+gate. Sorry count flat, but the route is de-risked from "vague assoc wall" to
  a single named construction (`hM` via faithful-functor reduction). Genuine structural advance.
- **FBC: STUCK persists.** Crux frontier ~10 iters, sorry-elimination still 0. Route B is a genuinely
  better frontier (clean isolated module identity vs bare crux) but did NOT close. Per pc030 + the
  iter-030 plan reversal signal, Route B walling → crux genuinely stuck → iter-031 re-scope the seed
  (NOT another Route-A/fold variant). Surfaced to planner + TO_USER.

## Subagent findings (reports in `.archon/logs/iter-030/`)
- **lvbc snap030** (1 must-fix / 3 major): must-fix = `lem:sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal` `\lean{}` points
  at the absent `sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal` (unknown constant) → I corrected it to the landed keystone
  `toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal` + `% NOTE`. Majors = 5 new decls uncovered (coverage debt); GATE prose
  claims `μ=sectionsMul` on the nose vs landed `μ = sectionsMul ≫ Γ(tensorObjLocalizedIso)` (addressed in
  `% NOTE`); proof-divergence — `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` still routes through the object pentagon. No
  `\leanok` laundering.
- **lvbc fbc030** (0 must-fix / 3 major / 1 minor): Route-B `_concrete` faithfully formalized + honestly
  marked (statement byte-identical to the crux, no proof-block `\leanok`). Majors all CARRYOVER from
  lvbc-fbc029: Route-A `_catCommSq` "realized" framing; `vcomp_glue` coverage debt; stale `mate_glue`
  proof prose. → recommendations (FBC blueprint realignment refactor iter).
- **lean-auditor iter030** (0 critical / 2 major / 5 minor): focus decls all genuine+sound
  (retyping-by-defeq correct via `abbrev` transparency); `_concrete` reduction real. MAJOR-1 = 5 no-op
  `set_option maxHeartbeats` on `/-! -/` doc-headers in FlatBaseChange (L2623, L2658–2661) — inert, leave
  declarations unguarded (4-iter repeat). MAJOR-2 = `SectionGradedRingLocalized.lean` ORPHANED (1306 lines,
  imported nowhere, outside build graph) + anachronistic iter-numbers (MINOR-5, subordinate). → recs.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal`: corrected
  `\lean{...sectionsFunctor_laxMonoidal}` (absent/unknown constant) → `\lean{...toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal}`
  (the landed keystone); added `% NOTE (iter-030 review)` recording the gate refinement
  (`μ = sectionsMul ≫ Γ(tensorObjLocalizedIso)`, not on-the-nose) + the 5-decl coverage-debt handoff.
- No `\leanok` override (sync markers verified accurate: no proof-block `\leanok` on any sorry-backed
  block, per lvbc snap030 + fbc030).

## Coverage debt
`archon dag-query unmatched` = **96** (was 91; +5 = the new SNAP decls
`localizedSheafification`, `toPresheafLocalized`, `localizedSheafificationAdjunction`,
`toPresheafLocalized_laxMonoidal`, `sectionsMul_eq_laxTensorator`). All listed in recommendations.md for
the planner to blueprint. Remainder unchanged (off-path SNAP internals + FBC helpers).

## Subagent skips
- (none — all 3 highly-recommended review subagents dispatched: lean-auditor whole-project + 2 per-file
  lean-vs-blueprint-checkers, one per prover-touched file.)
